title: Foundry Evals Trust Profile
description: Declares the evaluator stack, calibration contract, and sampling design for a Foundry hosted-agent trust evaluation.

unit_of_analysis.description: Granularity of a single evaluation record; must be 'session'.

threshold_rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of how thresholds were chosen.

last_calibrated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the most recent calibration run.

evaluation_design.description: Optional evaluation design flags for the trust profile.

held_out_data_only.description: True if evaluation uses only held-out data not seen during rubric authoring.

rubric_applicable.description: True if a task-specific rubric applies to this evaluation.

task_specific_rubric.description: Optional reviewed task-specific rubric describing evaluation criteria.

reviewed.description: True if the rubric has been reviewed against known-good and known-bad sessions.

simulator.description: Optional simulator configuration. Use usr8_report to document USR-8 baseline results from real human sessions.

benchmark.description: Optional pinned benchmark reference. Use applicable, name, version, judge_version, and delta for release-to-release attribution.

role.description: Evaluator gate role: gate (hard threshold), trend (tracking only), or human_review (manual triage).

sla.description: SLA distribution strategy across evaluation slots.
